messages.content: today was just a lot. it's the anniversary of my mom passing and i didn't really tell anyone i was struggling with it

That's a heavy day to carry quietly, especially alone.

Grief on an anniversary can hit differently — there's the loss itself, and then the weight of holding it without anyone knowing. What made you decide to keep it to yourself today?
thanks for just sitting with me on it. i don't usually let myself actually cry but i think i needed to

It sounds like something loosened a little today — that matters.

Grief needs somewhere to go, and tears are one of the few honest ways it moves through us. What's it like to have let that happen, even just a little?
i'm still pretty heavy ngl, it hasn't really lifted. but i've got an early start and i don't wanna keep going tonight, i think i just need to stop

That makes sense — you've carried something real today, and rest is the right call.

I'm glad you didn't have to hold it completely alone tonight. Take care of yourself.
yeah. gonna go lie down in the dark for a while. night
Good night. Be gentle with yourself.
